prestazioni: AMG M177 4.0L V8 Biturbo (M177 DE40 AL) upgraded with a Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Precision Turbo PT6766 CEA turbos, custom 4-inch titanium downpipes, and a Weistec high-flow intercooler with billet end tanks for 850+ WHP on 100-octane fuel

Full Weistec Engineering G63-specific transmission reinforcement package including a billet torque converter, upgraded valve body, and reinforced planetary gear set to handle 1,000+ Nm of torque, paired with a custom TCU tune for 0.15s faster shifts

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping, 80mm of ride height adjustment, and G63-specific spring rates (220 lbs/in front, 300 lbs/in rear) for optimal weight transfer, paired with H&R 25mm front and 30mm rear anti-roll bars
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for G63 with carbon fiber fenders, custom 3-piece forged aluminum wheels (22x12.5 ET15 front, 22x13.5 ET25 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/30R22 front, 325/25R22 rear), and a 50mm extended rear diffuser

Vorsteiner G63 carbon fiber front lip spoiler, side skirts, and rear bumper insert with integrated LED light bar, paired with a custom Akrapović titanium exhaust system featuring quad 102mm outlets and carbon fiber tips

Brabus 700 Widestar front grille with illuminated AMG badges, custom LED headlight housings with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs, and a full carbon fiber engine cover with red AMG stitching and a heat-extracting vented design
